title: Oil prices rise after US and Iran exchange fire in Hormuz strait
description: The flare-up further endangers the US-Iran ceasefire, which Trump extended indefinitely on 21 April.
content:
Oil prices rise on Friday in Asia after the US and Iran exchanged fire in the key Strait of Hormuz waterway.
The US military said it intercepted what it called "unprovoked" Iranian attacks - including missiles, drones and small boats - and carried ou... [1474 chars]

title: Crystal Palace ease past Shakhtar to set up Conference League final against Rayo Vallecano
description: An Ismaïla Sarr strike and an own goal give Palace a 2-1 win on the night against Shakhtar Donetsk, 5-2 on aggregate, to reach their maiden European final
content: As the song that has accompanied them on their maiden European adventure promised all along, Crystal Palace are on their way to Leipzig. Sixteen years after rescuing the club he supported as a child from administration, Steve Parish watched on with i... [4376 chars]

title: Two Islamic-State linked Australian women charged with crimes against humanity
description: A third woman who also returned to Australia from Syria was charged with joining a terrorist organisation.
content:
Three Australian women with links to the Islamic State (IS) group have been formally charged after returning home from Syria.
Kawsar Ahmad, 53 and her daughter Zeinab Ahmad, 31 appeared in a Melbourne court on Friday, less than 24 hours after they we... [2724 chars]

title: taker who changed how we see Earth
description: A celebration of the career of Sir David Attenborough on his 100th birthday in video, audio and pictures.
content: Seeing the African rainforest fauna for the first time, the sheer abundance of it, the super-abundance of it, the variety of form: the chameleons here, snakes there, wonderful birds there – sunbirds – just breathtaking. And of course, added to that, ... [5165 chars]

title: Crystal Palace: Eagles on verge of 'unbelievable' glory after reaching Conference League final
description: Crystal Palace desperately did not want to be in the Conference League - now they are one game from winning it and creating more club history and a "perfect" finale for boss Oliver Glasner.
content:
Crystal Palace desperately did not want to be in the Conference League - now they are one game from winning it and creating more club history.
